taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Software Engineering, Frontend Software Engineer
core_skills: Frontend development, React, TypeScript, Computer science fundamentals, Algorithms
skill_match_scores: Frontend development:0.5, React:1.0, TypeScript:1.0, Computer science fundamentals:1.0, Algorithms:1.0
must_have_quals: 2–5 years' of industry experience specializing in frontend development for scalable web applications, Strong foundation on the modern frontend stack, including fluency React and Typescript, Strong fundamental computer science skills, Knowledge of algorithms and data structures, A strong understanding of core computer science concepts and web application architecture, including security, performance, and scalability, A genuine passion for building customer-facing products and a drive to solve problems that create real value for users, Experience collaborating with backend teams to define API contracts that power dynamic frontend experiences, BS/MS/PhD in Computer Science or related majors, or equivalent experience
core_responsibilities: Design, develop, and deliver highly interactive and responsive user interfaces that have a direct impact on our customers and partners, Work closely with Designers and Product Managers to translate complex requirements into intuitive workflows, Architect and build robust, reusable frontend components and state management systems using TypeScript and React, Optimize web performance to ensure a seamless experience, focusing on core web vitals and efficient data rendering, Write clean, well-tested, and maintainable code, while contributing to our shared design system and internal frontend standards
job_summary: Snowflake is a leading company in the data revolution, focused on building an effective and accessible cloud data platform. They are looking for a Frontend Software Engineer to design and develop interactive user interfaces for their AI Data Cloud, collaborating closely with designers and product managers to create exceptional user experiences.
